title: DI Containers vs. Manual Injection
description: Evaluate the performance and complexity trade-offs between DI containers (e.g., Inversify) and manual functional factory composition. Analyze scenarios where reflection-based containers provide benefits versus the simplicity of manual injection.
objectives: Evaluate the performance and complexity trade-offs between DI containers (e.g., Inversify) and manual functional factory composition.
Analyze scenarios where reflection-based containers provide benefits versus the simplicity of manual injection.
